summary: 23 tests covering getColors, getCurrentTheme, getCurrentThemeName, getThemeNames, setTheme — exact color values, filesystem persistence, all-theme completeness invariants (error≠success, diffAdd=success, diffRemove=error)
notes: Filesystem side-effect tested via real ~/.config/jesus-tui/preferences.json with save/restore. Module-level state reset via setTheme('mocha') in beforeEach.
